register.note: Forced 0 — hero.png is a document header (title, paragraph, metadata card, four-act rail) with no graphic above the fold, where ciechanowski-watch/00 already renders the 3D watch with a drag affordance in the first viewport.
Forced 0 — there is no hero plot, so the visible residual squares seeing-theory-regression/01 shows in its first frame have no counterpart here.

The see-spine plot self-describes (title, 'drag a point to refit all three', inline Huber/absolute line labels, a penalty-curve legend, SLOPE/INTCPT/LOSS readout) and matches the bar in spirit, but stops short of distill-momentum/02 where each small-multiple's caption plus governing inequality lives inside the figure.

Warm and restrained, but the see hero leaves a ~400px dead right column and the pink residual squares alpha-stack into a muddy overlapping blob top-right — aliased and heavy where ciechanowski-watch/02 keeps every stroke individually clean.

Drag-point / drop-rogue-points / judge-toggle / penalty-slider affordances imply explanatory live refits, but motion is unverifiable from statics and there is no steppable transport for a complex sequence the way 3b1b-gradient-descent/02 steps the cost accumulation.

Semantic grammar held exactly per DESIGN.md (blue=prediction/fit, gold=truth/data, red=error/residual/loss) across all four views and carried into prose with hue+underline+weight; as disciplined as r2d3-trees/00, with the only dilution being the error-hue pooling in the stacked squares.

hero.note: A hero would need a full-width, isolated 'one cloud, three judges' plot above the fold with the residual squares and labeled fit lines already composed — poster-worthy as a thumbnail.

assessment.note: The hands-on work lives in the 04 LAB TASK, but the 05 TRANSFER item itself is a three-option MCQ (Switch to Huber / Train longer / Drop the mansions), not an interaction or open prompt.

blocking: No hero specimen: add a full-width composed 'three judges' plot above the fold so the mechanism (residual squares, three fit lines) is the page's face, not a metadata card.
Fix the residual-square alpha-stacking blob (outline-only above N squares or clamp the y-range) — it drags both atmosphere-finish and the colour dilution note.
Make the 05 TRANSFER item an interaction/open prompt rather than a third MCQ, or relabel the hands-on lab task as the transfer.
verdict.summary: Strong annotation and colour discipline, but the absent hero forces the DELIGHT floor to 0 and atmosphere/motion sit at 2 — register does not clear 3.
